name: Dave Geoffrey
abilities: ★ Fairways in Regulation — looses every drive dead down the pike and sticks every approach to the flag; the FIR Dogs never lose the scent. Give the man a target and it's already hit.
Marksman of God's Country. The home-track native who's stalked every fairway in Huron County. Sharpest blade in the field — handicap 14 → 9 and still falling. "Zoomers are my golf superpower."
flavor: “Ironwood's light years better than Stoga — and I'd know.”
caption: Dave Geoffrey · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
